In [2]:
def recover_counts(adata):
    adata_raw = adata.uns["layers_counts"].copy()
    adata_raw = adata_raw[adata.obs_names, adata.var_names]
    return adata_raw.X

def perform_scvi(adata):
    import scvi
    import torch
    torch.set_float32_matmul_precision('high')

    adata_scvi = adata[:, adata.var["highly_variable"]].copy()
    scvi.model.SCVI.setup_anndata(adata_scvi, layer='counts', batch_key='sample')
    vae = scvi.model.SCVI(adata_scvi, n_layers=2, n_latent=30, gene_likelihood="nb")
    vae.train()
    return vae

In [4]:
adata.obs['group'] = adata.obs['group'].replace({"ssc-PH": "Ssc-PAH"})
In [5]:
cell_mask_pericyte = adata.obs["anno_lv3"] == "Pericyte"
if "Pericyte" not in adata.obs["anno_lv2"].cat.categories:
    adata.obs["anno_lv2"] = adata.obs["anno_lv2"].cat.add_categories("Pericyte")
adata.obs.loc[cell_mask_pericyte, "anno_lv2"] = "Pericyte"

cell_mask_fibro = adata.obs["anno_lv3"].isin(["FIB mitochodrial-active"])
adata.obs.loc[cell_mask_fibro, "anno_lv2"] = "Fibro"

cell_mask_fibro2 = adata.obs["anno_lv3"].isin(["FIB alveolar"])
adata.obs.loc[cell_mask_fibro2, "anno_lv2"] = "Fibro"

    "6": "Fibro_c1_MFAP5",
    "7": "Fibro_c6_ASPN",
    "8": "Fibro_c7_MYH11",
    "9": "drop",
}
fibro.obs["final_celltype"] = fibro.obs["leiden"].map(final_dict)

In [43]:
import scvi
import torch
adata_scvi = fibro[:, fibro.var["highly_variable"]].copy()
lvae = scvi.model.SCANVI.from_scvi_model(
    vae,
    adata=adata_scvi,
    labels_key="final_celltype",
    unlabeled_category="Unknown",
)
lvae.train(max_epochs=40, n_samples_per_label=20)
